title: stelis caudex
intro: Stelis caudex, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis caudex include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Stelis caudex is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's roots, leaves, or flowers in hot water or a solvent.
